birds.evidence: The spot-winged grosbeak (Mycerobas melanozanthos) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae, found in middle to higher elevations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lalage | species = melaschistos | authority = (Hodgson, 1836) | synonyms = Coracina melaschistos }} The black-winged cuckooshrike (Lalage melaschistos), also known as lesser grey cuckooshrike or dark grey cuckooshrike, is a species of cuckooshrike found in South to Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The oriental scops owl (Otus sunia) is a scops owl species native to South and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Wood Snipe, Thailand The wood snipe (Gallinago nemoricola) is a species of snipe which breeds in the Himalayas of northern India, Nepal, Bhutan and southern China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Indian blue robin (Larvivora brunnea) is a small bird found in the Indian subcontinent

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Suthora | species = nipalensis | authority = (Hodgson, 1837) | synonyms = Paradoxornis nipalensis }} The black-throated parrotbill (Suthora nipalensis) is a parrotbill species often placed with the Old World babblers (family Timaliidae) or in a distinct family Sylviidae, but it actually seems to belong to the distinct family Paradoxornithidae. It is found in the northern regions of the Indian subcontinent, primarily in the central and eastern Himalayas, and in adjoining parts of Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Paradoxornis | species = aemodius | authority = (Hodgson, 1841) | synonyms = *Conostoma oemodium *Conostoma aemodium }} The great parrotbill (Paradoxornis aemodius) is a bird species the Paradoxornithidae family. It is found in Bhutan, China, India, Myanmar, and Nepal. It was previously placed in a monotypic genus, the Conostoma

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown parrotbill (Paradoxornis unicolor) is a parrotbill found in the central and eastern Himalayas
